creator: stefan@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Wen,

there seems to be a problem with the plist here. Please see [1]. The
'find' calls in the post-install target find files installed by *all*
Python packages, not just the ones installed by py-opengl. Can you please
have a look at it and send an updated patch?

Thanks and regards,
Stefan

[1]: http://tb3.droso.net/logs/7-stefan/py25-opengl-3.0.0.b6.log
